name: Bean'n' Burger Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 3/4 oz.) navy beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (8 3/4 oz.) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (8 3/4 oz.) lima beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan or Dutch oven, brown the ground beef over medium heat until no longer pink.
2. Drain excess fat from the pan.
3. Add diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, chopped onion, and minced garlic to the pan.
4. Stir in brown sugar, seasoned salt, chili powder, ground cumin, dried thyme, savory, marjoram, oregano, and parsley flakes.
5. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
6. Cover the pot and simmer over low heat for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the rinsed and drained navy beans, kidney beans, and lima beans until evenly incorporated.
8. Spoon about 1/2 cup of the mixture into each halved pita bread.
9. Optionally top with shredded cheddar cheese.
10. Serve immediately.
Yield: 5 servings
